ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert is triggered */,
  "date_set" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock within a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock's value since purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used in the simulation */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount for the simulation */,
  "final_value" REAL /* Final value of the simulation */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "start_price" REAL /* Price at the start of the simulation */,
  "end_price" REAL /* Price at the end of the simulation */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the simulation */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the simulation period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the simulation period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the stock traded during the simulation period */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock's value during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who wrote the report */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analyst report */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full analyst report */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the analyst report (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analyst account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analyst's information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Analyst account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
